nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.id: loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039
nodes.name: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄
nodes.summary: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括马来山鹧鸪、红腹角雉、Green-billed coucal等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 卡尔·林奈
nodes.summary: 卡尔·林奈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联115种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、角叫鴨、白臉樹鴨等115种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: 鹈形目
nodes.summary: 鹈形目（Pelecaniformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联93种鸟类，如朱鹮、黑脸琵鹭、Plumbeous ibis等93种鸟类。

nodes.name: 隱䴉
nodes.summary: 隱䴉（Northern bald ibis，学名 Geronticus eremita），分类上属于鹈形目，并归入鹮科，在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要分布于卡尔·林奈、自然系统第十版、國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、峡谷峭壁、湿地，主要威胁包括猎捕压力、农药污染、人类活动扰动。
locations: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鹮科
nodes.summary: 鹮科（Threskiornithidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联30种鸟类，如朱鹮、黑脸琵鹭、Plumbeous ibis等30种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

nodes.name: 自然系统第十版
nodes.summary: 自然系统第十版是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联64种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、黑嘴樹鴨、加拿大雁等64种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The northern bald ibis, hermit ibis, or Waldrapp (Geronticus eremita) is a migratory Old World ibis found in open areas such as grasslands, rocky mountains, and semi-deserts, often close to running water

links.key: bird-隱-45a68f24__distributed_in__loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039
links.target: loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: These programmes and the natural growth in Morocco from about 200 birds in the 1990s helped to downlist the northern bald ibis from Critically Endangered to Endangered on the IUCN Red List in 2018. The down-listing of conservation status for the species has been described as controversial decision and not taking fully into account the recent extinction in the wild of the genetically distinct and only long-range migratory population that used to breed in the Middle East and wintering in Eastern Africa. The long-term decline in Europe has been linked to hunting and use as food, especially the fledglings

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The northern bald ibis, hermit ibis, or Waldrapp (Geronticus eremita) is a migratory Old World ibis found in open areas such as grasslands, rocky mountains, and semi-deserts, often close to running water

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|Part of a flock in the Souss Massa stronghold Unlike many other ibises, which nest in trees and feed in wetlands, the northern bald ibis breeds on undisturbed cliff ledges, and forages for food in irregularly cultivated, grazed dry areas such as semi-arid steppes, and fallow fields

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: These programmes and the natural growth in Morocco from about 200 birds in the 1990s helped to downlist the northern bald ibis from Critically Endangered to Endangered on the IUCN Red List in 2018. The down-listing of conservation status for the species has been described as controversial decision and not taking fully into account the recent extinction in the wild of the genetically distinct and only long-range migratory population that used to breed in the Middle East and wintering in Eastern Africa. The long-term decline in Europe has been linked to hunting and use as food, especially the fledglings

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: These include significant human persecution, especially hunting, and also the loss of steppe and non-intensive agricultural areas (particularly in Morocco), pesticide poisoning, disturbance, and dam construction. The tracking of adults and chicks migrating southward from Syria enabled to clarify that electrocution, together with uncontrolled hunting, along the migratory flyway was a key threat explaining the low or zero recruitment at the Syrian colony.{{cite journal|author=G
